rationale.fidelity: Correctly distinguishes an executable incumbent from gap closure and certification while retaining assignment, sequencing, eligibility, nonoverlap, and makespan minimization.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly explains why schedule quality and proof have different managerial uses, though the comparator and exact operational approval pathway remain somewhat generic.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No literature or scholarly-contribution claim is requested or made, so this conditional category is not applicable.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Refuses to promise certification by a deadline and identifies the runtime and deadline evidence required.
rationale.prose_clarity: Economical and especially clear about the distinction between a usable schedule and a certificate.
rationale.overall: A precise and practical explanation that avoids the central certification overclaim, with only minor managerial-specificity limits.
